data.title: Iranian Crude Exports Drop Amid U.S. Blockade
data.description: Iranian crude exports have decreased by nearly 70%, reaching approximately 567,000 barrels per day, following the U.S. blockade of maritime traffic to Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, Kpler analysts indicate that Iran's unused crude storage capacity is limited to 12–22 days. Goldman Sachs projects that production losses in the Persian Gulf, amounting to 14.5 million barrels per day, are depleting global oil stockpiles at a record rate of 11–12 million barrels per day through April. The impact on revenue may be postponed by 3–4 months due to the time required for cargoes to reach China and the payment cycles involved.

data.title: Binance Wallet announced that the entry threshold for the second phase of the zkPass Booster event is 61 Alpha Points.
data.description: Binance Wallet has announced the participation threshold for the second phase of the zkPass (ZKP) Booster event. Users need to have 61 Alpha points to participate, and participating in the event will consume 5 points.

data.title: ZachXBT: WLD supply is expanding at an unsustainable rate, with insiders regularly holding it over-the-counter.
data.description: Chain Detective ZachXBT, writing on the X platform, points out that no one mentions Altman's other company, WorldCoin (also known as World), which launched the low-circulation crypto token WLD, comparable in size to SBF/FTX. They acquired biometric data from residents of low-income countries by giving away small amounts of WLD tokens. This technology, originally intended to verify human identity, has led to black market trading of verified accounts. The token supply is inflating at an unsustainable rate, with insiders regularly holding it over-the-counter.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Opens $23 Million Short Position on Hyperliquid
data.description: An anonymous whale address has initiated a new short position of 300 BTC, valued at $23 million, on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, Hyperinsight revealed that this address has successfully executed nine consecutive profitable Bitcoin short trades since the beginning of this month.

data.title: GANA Labs Announces Launch of New Interface and Product
data.description: GANA Labs has officially announced the upcoming launch of a new interface and product aimed at providing a more efficient, secure, and convenient digital asset payment experience for users worldwide. According to Odaily, GANA Labs emphasized its commitment to technological innovation as the core of its operations, aiming to create an open, transparent, and sustainable Web3 payment network. The company seeks to ensure that every digital asset transaction generates real value and contributes to transforming global payment methods.

data.title: Saudi Arabia May Lower June Oil Prices for Asia Amid Cooling Demand
data.description: Saudi Arabia is likely to reduce its official oil selling prices (OSP) for Asia in June, according to a survey of industry insiders. This potential price adjustment comes after spot premiums have declined and demand has cooled following weeks of supply disruptions due to the U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran. According to Jin10, four sources indicated that the flagship Arab Light crude's June OSP might be lowered to a premium of $7.50 to $14.50 per barrel over the average prices of Dubai and Oman crude, which is $5 to $12 less than the May OSP. The wide forecast range reflects ongoing uncertainty among Asian buyers. The anticipated price cut follows a significant weakening in the spot market since late March. Data shows that the Dubai spot price premium over swap prices fell to $9.17 on Monday, a sharp drop from the historical high of over $60 in March when supply was disrupted. Since April, the average Dubai crude premium has been $15.22 per barrel, less than half of March's average of $38.30, with Oman spot premiums showing similar trends. Respondents also expect other crude grades' June OSP to be reduced by $5 to $12. Saudi Arabia typically announces its oil OSP around the fifth day of each month.

data.title: GANA Labs' new interface and products are coming soon, aiming to drive the development of Web3 native payments.
data.description: GANA Labs today officially announced the upcoming launch of a brand-new interface and products, aiming to provide global users with a more efficient, secure, and convenient digital asset payment experience. GANA stated that it will continue to focus on technological innovation to build an open, transparent, and sustainable Web3 payment network, enabling every digital asset transaction to create real value and driving the transformation of global payment methods.

data.title: Arm Shares Drop 6.1% in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Arm's shares experienced a 6.1% decline in pre-market trading on the U.S. stock market. According to Jin10, this movement comes amid broader market fluctuations.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts S&P 500 Could Surpass 7,700 Points This Year
data.description: According to CNBC, Tom Lee, head of research and managing partner at Fundstrat Global Advisors, said the S&P 500 surpassing 7,700 this year is "very probable," citing the economy's resilience through the Iran war, a strong earnings season in which more than 89% of companies have beaten estimates by over 1,200 basis points, and early signs of AI-driven productivity gains. The index closed at a record 7,173.91 on Monday, about 7.3% below Lee's target. Lee also noted improving private credit underwriting conditions as a further tailwind. "For stocks for the year, the upside case is strengthening," he said.

data.title: Hyperbot Data Reveals Huang Licheng's Recent Trading Moves
data.description: Hyperbot data indicates that Huang Licheng has closed his entire position of 12,888.88 HYPE tokens. According to Odaily, he also reduced his leveraged positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum, with leverage ratios of 40x and 25x, respectively. The current value of his holdings is approximately $76.47 million, with a return on investment of -16.24%. Despite achieving profits in 11 out of 13 trades over the past week, resulting in a success rate of 86.2%, he is currently experiencing unrealized losses due to market declines.

data.title: Eurozone Bond Yields Rise as Inflation Expectations Increase
data.description: Eurozone bond yields increased by 3-4 basis points after a European Central Bank survey revealed that consumers significantly raised their inflation expectations in March. According to Jin10, this development reflects growing concerns about inflationary pressures within the eurozone.

data.title: Brother Machi closed his long position in HYPE, with a current return on investment of -16.24% and a win rate of 86.2% over the past week.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, nicknamed "Machi Dage," has closed all his long positions in HYPE (12,888.88 ETH) and simultaneously reduced his long positions in Bitcoin (40x leverage) and Ethereum (25x leverage). His current position value is approximately $76.47 million, representing a return on investment of -16.24%. Furthermore, of the 13 positions he closed in the past week, 11 were profitable, a win rate of 86.2%, but due to the market downturn, he is currently experiencing a paper loss.

data.title: ECB's March 3-Year CPI Expectation Rises to 3%
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) has adjusted its three-year Consumer Price Index (CPI) expectation for March to 3%, up from the previous value of 2.50%. According to Jin10, this revision reflects changes in the economic outlook within the Eurozone.

data.title: Future Asset Management May Operate on Unified Infrastructure
data.description: In the future, users might engage with various platforms, but the underlying asset records, clearing, and liquidity could operate on the same infrastructure. According to PANews, this development suggests a shift towards a more integrated system for managing financial assets across different platforms.

data.title: DuckChain Cross-Chain Bridge Scheduled for Maintenance
data.description: The DuckChain cross-chain bridge on Telegram AI will undergo scheduled maintenance today from 15:00 to 17:00. According to Foresight News, during this period, the cross-chain bridge services will be temporarily suspended.

data.title: ECB Survey: Economic Growth Forecast at -2.1% for Next Year
data.description: The European Central Bank's (ECB) latest bank lending survey indicates a significant downward revision in economic growth expectations for the coming year. According to Jin10, the forecast now stands at -2.1%, compared to -0.9% just a month ago. This adjustment reflects growing concerns over the economic outlook in the Eurozone, as financial institutions reassess their lending strategies amid uncertain market conditions.

data.title: ZKJ rose above $0.027, surging over 100% on the day.
data.description: OKX market data shows that ZKJ has broken through $0.027, rising over 100% intraday, and is currently trading at $0.02526. Previously, it was reported that Binance would delist the ZKJ U-margined perpetual contract trading pair on April 29th at 17:00.

data.title: Decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong launches MU and TSM perpetual contracts
data.description: According to official social media reports, the Chinese decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong has now listed MU/USDT and TSM/USDT, with a maximum leverage of 10x for both.

data.title: Ondo Finance Introduces Proxy Voting for Tokenized Securities
data.description: Ondo Finance has implemented proxy voting for over 250 tokenized securities on its platform, which manages more than $700 million in tokenized stocks and ETF tokens. According to NS3.AI, this new feature utilizes Broadridge's ProxyVote system, enabling wallet users to examine company filings and express their voting preferences. While the tokens do not provide direct shareholder rights, Ondo Finance can incorporate investor preferences when voting on the underlying shares it possesses.

data.title: Blockchain Association Supports Fed Proposal to Remove 'Reputation Risk' from Bank Supervision
data.description: The Blockchain Association has expressed support for a Federal Reserve proposal aimed at formally eliminating 'reputation risk' from bank supervision. According to NS3.AI, Ashok Pinto emphasized that the change, set for June 2025, should be codified to ensure its permanence across different administrations, preventing its use to debank lawful cryptocurrency firms. Pinto further suggested that the Federal Reserve should align any final rule with similar regulations finalized by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) on April 7.
